1000609620.korean: - 문이 열리고, 샬럿은 고양이마냥 튀어 올라 내 목덜미에 엉겨 붙었다.

1000609621.english: Your Majesty~? Today, to celebrate Halloween, I have prepared a very... secret play that I will show only to Your Majesty.
1000609621.korean: 폐하앙~? 오늘은 제가 할로윈을 기념해서 폐하께만 보여드릴...&n아주... 비밀스러운극을 준비했답니다?

1000609622.english: I've prepared the blackest and thinnest outfit in my wardrobe... &n You can look forward to it. Hehe~!
1000609622.korean: 제 의상실에서 가장 검고 얇은 복장을 준비했으니...&n기대하셔도 좋아요. 후훗~!

1000609623.english: Okay~! Okay~ Trick or treat... Aaaah~♡

1000609624.english: - I released Charlotte's hand from around the back of her neck and stuffed it with cookies.
1000609624.korean: - 난 목덜미를 휘감는 샬럿의 손을 풀고, 그 손에 쿠키를 가득 쥐여주었다.

1000609625.english: Charlotte's face hardens into a cold, frozen expression. Could it be her mood? The temperature in the captain's cabin seems to have dropped a few degrees.
1000609625.korean: - 싸늘하게 굳어가는 샬럿의 얼굴. 기분 탓일까? 함장실의 온도가 몇 도쯤 떨어진 것 같다.

1000609626.english: - I understand how Charlotte feels... but no matter what... you can't do something like that in broad daylight.
1000609626.korean: - 샬럿의 심정은 알지만... 아무리 그렇다고 해도...&n대낮부터 그런 짓을 할 순 없지.

1000609628.english: This is... truly grateful... Your Majesty... but...!

1000609629.english: - Alice, who brushes back her long hair and gives a strange smile.
1000609629.korean: - 긴 머리칼을 쓸어넘기며 묘한 웃음을 지어 보이는 앨리스.

1000609630.english: I've been on the battlefield for so long that I forgot that my sisters are excellent maids. It was my fault.
1000609630.korean: 오랫동안 전장을 누비고 다니느라, 우리 자매들이 우수한 메이드라는 사실을 잊고 있었어요.&n... 제 실책이에요.

1000609631.english: "Are you trying to avoid my hand?" Alice continued to play with her hair.
1000609631.korean: - 내 손을 피하려는 걸까? 계속해서 머리칼을 만지작거리는 앨리스.

1000609632.english: - I grabbed Alice's hand and placed a cookie on it.
1000609632.korean: - 난 그런 앨리스의 손을 잡아채서 그 위에 쿠키를 얹어 주었다.

1000609633.english: Alice blushed slightly as she looked at the cookies. Was she feeling a little better?
1000609633.korean: - 앨리스는 쿠키를 바라보며 얼굴을 조금 붉혔다. 기분이 그리 나쁘진 않았던 걸까?

1000609635.english: - Alice gently stroked my cheek with a playful expression.
1000609635.korean: - 앨리스는 장난스러운 표정을 한 채로 내 볼을 살며시 쓰다듬었다.

1000609636.english: Umm... I really don't understand, Master...
1000609636.korean: 으음... 저는 정말 이해가 안 돼요. 주인님...

1000609637.english: The master is human... but why...

1000609638.english: Are you going to let [c][ffd130]Halloween with Bioroids[-][/c] go by like that?

1000609639.english: If not... does our master need to mentally prepare himself to receive a different kind of service?
1000609639.korean: 그것도 아니라면... 우리 주인님께서는 색다른 시중을 받기 위한 마음의 준비가 필요하신 걸까?

1000609640.english: We'll be leaving now. But... Master?

1000609641.english: On Halloween Eve... please don't embarrass us too much. We too... are just ordinary women in front of you, Master...
1000609641.korean: 할로윈 전야 때는... 저희를 너무 부끄럽게 만들지 말아 주시겠어요?&n저희도... 주인님 앞에선... 평범한 여자일 뿐이니까요...

1000609643.english: ... Don't block my way, get out of my way, you dirty heart. You know it's because of you that I'm late in coming to the master, right?
1000609643.korean: ... 길을 막지 말고, 저리 비키세요 칠칠치 못한 가슴.&n당신 때문에 주인님께 오는 길이 늦은 건 알고 있겠죠?

1000609645.english: I'm sorry I can't find the right expression. My heart is not neat.
1000609645.korean: 적당한 표현을 찾지 못해서 미안해요. 단정하지 못한 가슴.

1000609646.english: You exhibitionist slut! Are you trying to insult me?
1000609646.korean: 이 노출광 색녀! 날 모욕할 셈이야?

1000609647.english: I'm not feeling so good today. So... I feel like blowing something up.
1000609647.korean: 오늘은 제 기분이 그리 좋지 않아요. 그래서... 뭐든 터트려 버리고 싶은 심정이에요.

1000609648.english: So... you should be thankful that firing on board is prohibited.
1000609648.korean: 그러니까... 당신은 함내 사격이 금지라는 사실에 감사하세요.

1000609649.english: - The two strong men of Orca left the captain's room, bickering.
1000609649.korean: - 오르카의 두 강자들은 투닥거리며 함장실을 빠져나갔다.

1000609650.english: - Vanilla and I remained silent until the sweet scent tickling our noses faded and disappeared entirely.
1000609650.korean: - 코를 간지럽히는 달콤한 향이 옅어지고 전부 사라질 때까지. 바닐라와 나는 침묵했다.

1000609652.english: I'll answer to the best of my knowledge. However, if you need more precise information, please submit a search request...
1000609652.korean: 아는 선에서 답해드리겠어요. 다만, 정확한 정보가 필요하시다면 검색 요청을...

1000609653.english: - The Halloween they talk about is different from the Halloween I knew... &n I wanted to know what the difference was.
1000609653.korean: - 그녀들이 말하는 할로윈은 내가 알고 있던 할로윈과는 뭔가 다르다...&n난 그 차이점을 알고 싶어졌다.

1000609654.english: Yes, master, what are you curious about?

1000609655.english: - The story of Halloween, enjoyed by humanity on the brink of extinction...

1000609657.english: If you'd like, I can show you some footage from Halloween in our archives. &n What should I do?
1000609657.korean: 원하신다면 보관소에서 할로윈 당시의 영상 자료를 보여드릴 수도 있습니다.&n어떻게 할까요?

1000609658.english: If you have any questions about the part I explained...

1000609660.english: Yes, it is exactly as you imagine.

1000609662.english: - Halloween was just an excuse, and the Bioroids of Halloween weren't even treated as real people.
1000609662.korean: - 할로윈이라는건 결국 핑계거리였고, 할로윈 당시의 바이오로이드들은&n인격체 취급도 받질 못했었다.

1000609663.english: - I quickly averted my gaze from Vanilla, which had been absentmindedly directed at me.
1000609663.korean: - 난 무심코 바닐라에게 가던 눈길을 급하게 거두었다.

1000609664.english: - Because after hearing that story, I couldn't look at Vanilla with confidence.
1000609664.korean: - 그런 이야기를 듣고, 바닐라를 당당하게 쳐다볼 수가 없었기 때문이다.

1000609665.english: Why are you like that, Master?

1000609666.english: I don't think the former master needs to worry about Halloween before the destruction.
1000609666.korean: 전 주인님께서 멸망 전의 할로윈 까지 신경 쓰실 필요는 없다고 생각해요.

1000609667.english: - After finishing speaking, Vanilla calmly poured me tea. I took the glass she handed me and sank into the chair.
1000609667.korean: - 말을 마친 바닐라는 차분한 자세로 내게 차를 따라주었고.&n난 그녀가 건내주는 잔을 들고 의자에 몸을 파묻었다.

1000609668.english: - The feeling of being suffocated still hasn't gone away, and my mind is becoming more and more complicated.
1000609668.korean: - 여전히 답답한 기분이 가시질 않았고, 머릿속은 점점 복잡해져만 간다.

1000609669.english: - I felt Vanilla's eyes scanning my face, but I didn't have the courage to continue talking to her. &n ... I'm... embarrassed...
1000609669.korean: - 내 얼굴을 살피는 바닐라의 눈길이 느껴졌지만, 그녀와 말을 이어갈 용기가 나질 않는다.&n... 난... 부끄럽다...

1000609670.english: ...I feel so fortunate to have met my former master.
1000609670.korean: ... 전 주인님과 만날 수 있어, 정말 다행이라 생각하고 있어요.

1000609671.english: The master... at least treats us as individuals.
1000609671.korean: 주인님께서는... 적어도 저희를 인격체로 대해 주시니까요.

1000609672.english: ... Hehehe... I'm glad you're doing better than I was worried about.
1000609672.korean: ... 후훗... 제가 걱정하던 것보다 멀쩡하셔서... 다행입니다.

1000609673.english: - Vanilla skillfully adjusted my mood, and I was able to smile, albeit bitterly.
1000609673.korean: - 바닐라는 능숙하게 내 기분을 맞춰줬고, 난 씁쓸하게나마 웃을 수 있었다.

1000609675.english: Looks like the kids are in trouble again.

1000609676.english: - If you're talking about kids, you're probably talking about LRL and Alvis.
1000609676.korean: - 꼬마들이라면. 분명 LRL과 알비스를 말하는 것이겠지.

1000609677.english: It's the festival season, so I don't think it's unreasonable for children to be excited.
1000609677.korean: 축제 기간이니까요. 아이들이 들떠있는 것도 무리는 아니라고 생각해요.

1000609678.english: Master? Could you please give the order to sortie?

1000609680.english: - The point at which the battle ends.

1000609681.english: - I called LRL and Alvis separately.

1000609682.english: - Alvis and LRL stare at me blankly.

1000609683.english: Count Alvis will accept the Commander's apology.
1000609683.korean: 알비스 백작은 사령관님의 사과를 받아 주겠어.

1000609684.english: ...I'm sorry, Commander. I won't do it again.

1000609685.english: Hoo. Hoo. Hoo. Human? You dare to accuse me of wrongdoing in front of the True King?
1000609685.korean: 후. 후. 후. 인간? 감히 진조를 앞에 두고 잘못을 따지려 드는 건가?

1000609687.english: - I understand the desire to get excited and wander around, but I just want to avoid putting the Orca kids in danger.
1000609687.korean: - 들떠서 이곳저곳 기웃거리고 싶은 마음은 이해하지만.&n오르카의 꼬마들이 위험에 빠지는 것만은 피하고 싶다.

1000609688.english: Right, Commander? We've brought a new friend. Do you want to come see it? Do you want to see it?
1000609688.korean: 있지, 사령관님? 우리가 새로운 친구를 데려왔어. 같이 보러 갈래?&n보고 싶지?

1000609689.english: - Count Alvis changes the subject with a bright smile... Has he become influenced by LRL?
1000609689.korean: - 해맑게 웃으며 화제를 돌리는 알비스 백작... 어느새 LRL에게 물든 걸까?

1000609690.english: - ...Alvis with sparkling eyes... LRL sobbing... &n ... Should we put off scolding him for a moment?
1000609690.korean: - ... 눈을 반짝이는 알비스... 울먹거리는 LRL...&n... 혼내는 건 잠시 미뤄둘까?

1000609691.english: Yeah, that guy hates chocolate, but he really likes meat. I'll bring him over soon...
1000609691.korean: 있지~ 그 친구는 초코는 싫어하고, 고기는 엄청 좋아해. 내가 금방 데려올...

1000609693.english: It's really spacious here. It's not noisy, and it smells good, right?
1000609693.korean: 여긴 정말 넓어. 시끄럽지도 않고, 좋은 냄새도 나는걸?

1000609694.english: - Red hair that caught your eye. A straitjacket, and... impressive fangs... The girl before your eyes gave off a beastly aura.
1000609694.korean: - 시선을 잡아 끄는 붉은 머리칼. 구속복, 그리고... 인상적인 송곳니...&n눈앞의 소녀는 마치 야수와 같은 분위기를 풍겼다.

1000609695.english: - By the way... why did this girl break through the door and come in?
1000609695.korean: - 그나저나... 이 소녀는 어째서 출입문을 찢고 들어온 걸까?

1000609696.english: - I see Brownie glancing past through the hole in the door. When our eyes meet, Brownie awkwardly salutes and starts walking again...
1000609696.korean: - 출입문에 난 구멍 사이로 브라우니가 힐끔거리며 지나가는 게 보인다.&n나와 눈이 마주치자 어색하게 경례하고 다시 발걸음을 옮기는 브라우니...

1000609697.english: - Anyway... I feel sorry for Fortune...

1000609698.english: New friend! Want a chocolate bar?

1000609700.english: - The girl who flatly rejected Alvis's offer. She seems to have a rather cool personality.
1000609700.korean: - 알비스의 제안을 단칼에 거절한 소녀. 꽤 시원시원한 성격처럼 보인다.

1000609701.english: Um... You're the leader here, right?

1000609702.english: Human. It'll be over soon, so just stay still. If it tickles, tell me.
1000609702.korean: 인간님. 금방 끝나니까 가만히 있어봐. 간지러우면 말해.

1000609703.english: - The red-haired girl came up to me and started sniffing.
1000609703.korean: - 붉은 머리칼의 소녀는 내게 다가와서 킁킁대며 냄새를 맡기 시작했다.

1000609704.english: - The girl's sudden behavior was a bit disconcerting, but... well, since Alvis and LRL are here, I guess nothing bad will happen.
1000609704.korean: - 소녀의 갑작스런 행동이 조금 당황스럽기는 했지만...&n뭐 알비스와 LRL이 있으니 별일은 없겠지.

1000609705.english: - I've met countless Bioroids, but... this is a fresh experience I've never had.
1000609705.korean: - 난 수많은 바이오로이드들을 만나 왔지만... 이런 신선한 경험은 처음이다.

1000609706.english: Yeah! That's right. A human! A human!

1000609707.english: Let me introduce myself. My name is Fenrir. I am Fenrir of Companion.
1000609707.korean: 소개할게. 내 이름은 펜리르. 컴패니언의 펜리르야.

1000609708.english: New friend! He's your one and only commander, so don't bite him. Got it?
1000609708.korean: 새로운 친구! 하나밖에 없는 사령관님이니까. 절대 깨물면 안 돼. 알았지?

1000609710.english: - I reached out to shake Fenrir's hand without thinking, but Fenrir seemed uncomfortable with my actions.
1000609710.korean: - 난 별생각 없이 손을 뻗어 펜리르와 악수를 하려 했지만, 펜리르는 내 행동이&n불편했던 모양이다.

1000609711.english: Krrrr... What are you doing now?

1000609712.english: Phew. Phew. Phew... Beast... An untamed wild beast. &n You'd better not move that hand lightly.
1000609712.korean: 후. 후. 후... 야수... 길들이지 못한 들짐승이지.&n그 손을 가볍게 놀리지 않는 게 좋아.

1000609713.english: - LRL spoke up, boasting. &n By the way... if there are any companions, they must be maids...
1000609713.korean: - LRL이 우쭐대며 한마디 거들었다.&n그건 그렇고... 컴패니언의 인원이라면, 분명 메이드일 텐데...

1000609714.english: ...This guy has been really noisy since earlier. It's annoying.

1000609715.english: I don't remember the name. It's small, white, and noisy.
1000609715.korean: 이름은 기억 안 나. 쪼끄맣고 하얗고, 시끄러워.

1000609717.english: - Fenrir just glanced at LRL, and he started to tremble.
1000609717.korean: - 펜리르가 힐끗 쳐다봤을 뿐인데 LRL은 바들바들 떨기 시작했다.

1000609718.english: Huh? Are you surprised? Sorry, my little white friend.
1000609718.korean: 응? 놀랬어? 미안해. 쪼끄맣고 하얀 친구.

1000609719.english: - Fenrir, realizing that LRL was scared, withdrew his will to kill, and thanks to him, LRL was able to breathe again.
1000609719.korean: - LRL이 겁을 먹은 사실을 깨달은 펜리르는 살기를 거두었고,&n덕분에 LRL은 다시 숨을 쉴 수 있었다.

1000609720.english: Yes. I'm just here on an errand. I'll just return this and go back.
1000609720.korean: 있지. 난 여기 심부름 왔을 뿐이야. 난 이것만 돌려주고 다시 갈 거야.

1000609721.english: Yeah. An errand. A witch asked me to deliver this. It's called an "Invitation to the Festival"... I wasn't really curious about the contents, so I didn't open it.
1000609721.korean: 응. 심부름. 어떤 마녀님이 이걸 전달해 달래. '축제의 초대장'이라던데...&n내용은 별로 안 궁금해서 안 뜯어봤어.

1000609722.english: - Fenrir handed me a black envelope with an impressive pumpkin mark.
1000609722.korean: - 펜리르는 내게 호박 마크가 인상적인 검은색 봉투를 내밀었다.

1000609723.korean: - 난 이걸 어떻게 받아 들이는 게 좋을까?

1000609724.english: - Who would have thought... that I would receive an invitation to a festival in a world where humanity has been destroyed...
1000609724.korean: - 설마... 인류가 멸망해 버린 세상에서 축제 초대장을 받게 될 줄은...

1000609725.english: Um... There's a witch living in some amusement park. She sent me.
1000609725.korean: 음... 어떤 유원지에 마녀님이 살고 있거든? 그 마녀님이 보냈어.

1000609726.english: Wow... there are still witches out there... for centuries...
1000609726.korean: 호오... 아직도 마녀가 남아있다니... 수 세기 동안...

1000609728.english: - Fenrir, who was stroking Alvis, continued speaking.
1000609728.korean: - 알비스를 쓰다듬고 있던 펜리르는 말을 이어갔다.

1000609729.english: Yes, I was hunting at an amusement park near here.
1000609729.korean: 있지. 이곳 근처에 있는 유원지에서 사냥 중이었는데,

1000609730.english: Suddenly, a witch appeared in front of me riding a broom.
1000609730.korean: 갑자기 마녀님이 빗자루를 타고 내 앞에 나타났어.

1000609731.english: That good witch promised me lots of delicious things if I did just one errand for her.
1000609731.korean: 그 착한 마녀님이 심부름을 하나만 해주면, 내게 맛있걸 잔뜩 준다고 약속했어.

1000609732.english: - ... Anyway, whoever sent this invitation knows Orca's location.
1000609732.korean: - ... 어찌 됐든, 이 초대장을 보낸 사람은 오르카의 위치를 알고 있다는 뜻.

1000609733.english: Should I narrow down the search team just in case? Or...
1000609733.korean: - 만약을 위해 수색인원을 추려야 할까? 아니면...

1000609734.english: Hwaaam~. Am I done with my work here? Should I go back then?
1000609734.korean: 후아암~. 난 여기서 할 일 다 끝났네? 나 그럼 돌아간다?

1000609735.english: Okay! Now that I've finished my errands, I should go get something to eat from the witch.
1000609735.korean: 응! 심부름 끝냈으니까, 마녀님한테 먹을 걸 받으러 가야지.

1000609736.english: - The red wolf, who was about to leave after neatly finishing his work, stopped walking.
1000609736.korean: - 깔끔하게 할 일을 마치고 돌아가려던 빨간 늑대는 발걸음을 멈추었다.

1000609739.english: - As I watched him shake his head... I felt like playing a prank on him for some reason.
1000609739.korean: - 고개를 젓는 모습을 보고 있자니... 왠지 모르게 장난을 치고 싶어졌다.

1000609740.english: Anything to eat? Do you have any meat?

1000609742.english: Fenrir, watching me closely. Well... let's stop joking around...
1000609742.korean: - 내 눈치를 살피는 펜리르. 그럼... 장난은 이 정도로 해 두고...

1000609743.english: - Let's postpone the scolding of Orca's children and first feed the faithful errand boy.
1000609743.korean: - 오르카의 꼬마들을 혼내는 건 다음으로 미루고, 우선 성실한 심부름꾼부터 배불리 먹이도록 하자.

1000609744.english: Heh heh heh... I'll show you what true wealth is. Don't be surprised by the tuna stockpiled in the pantry, country wolf.
1000609744.korean: 큭큭큭... 네게 진정한 부가 뭔지 보여주지. 식료품 창고에 쌓여있는 참치를 보고&n놀라지 마라 시골 늑대.

1000609745.english: Are you going with the wolf? Okay!

1000609746.english: Just follow Count Alvis. I'll show you the Orca! And the shower room...
1000609746.korean: 알비스 백작님만 따라와. 내가 오르카 구경시켜줄게! 그리고 샤워실은...

1000609747.english: Really? Am I allowed to do that? I'm just a wanderer.
1000609747.korean: 정말? 나 그래도 돼? 난 그냥 떠돌이인데?

1000609748.english: Humans are really kind!? Why are you so kind?
1000609748.korean: 인간님은 정말 착하구나!? 왜 그렇게 착해?

1000609750.english: Then can I look around here for a bit? No, can I look around for a bit longer?
1000609750.korean: 그럼 나 여기 조금만 둘러봐도 돼? 아니 좀 오래 둘러봐도 돼?

1000609751.english: - I just offered him a meal, but Fenrir circled around me and didn't know how to leave.
1000609751.korean: - 그저 식사를 권했을 뿐인데 펜리르는 내 주변을 빙빙 돌며 떠날 줄 몰랐다.

1000609753.english: I'll be back soon, human! No...

1000609755.english: You, human, are my master from now on. I have decided so.
1000609755.korean: 인간님은 앞으로 내 주인님이야. 내가 그렇게 정했어.

1000609756.english: Seeing you giving me meat, you must be my master!
1000609756.korean: 내게 고기를 주는 걸 보니 인간님은 내 주인님이 틀림없어!

1000609757.english: I'll be back soon, so wait and don't move, Master!
1000609757.korean: 나 금방 다녀올 테니까 기다리고 꼼짝 말고 기다리고 있어야 해 주인님!

1000609758.english: - Fenrir bent down and slipped through the torn door.
1000609758.korean: - 펜리르는 몸을 숙여 찢긴 문 사이로 슥 하고 빠져나갔다.

1000609759.english: - Fenrir and the children disappear, and the excited atmosphere cools down.
1000609759.korean: - 펜리르와 꼬마들이 사라지고, 들뜬 분위기가 식어간다.

1000609760.english: - This invitation might be related to that crazy festival.
1000609760.korean: - 그 미쳐버린 축제와 연관되어 있을지도 모를 이 초대장.

1000609762.english: - The moment when Fenrir disappears and you can take a breather.
1000609762.korean: - 펜리르가 사라지고 잠시 한숨을 돌리려는 순간.

1000609763.english: - Two wolves, still hungry, squeezed through the crack in the torn captain's cabin door.
1000609763.korean: - 여전히 굶주려 있는 늑대 두 마리가 찢겨진 함장실 문 틈으로 몸을 들이밀었다.

1000609764.english: - ... If you had your fortune told today, wouldn't it have said to beware of wolves?
1000609764.korean: - ... 오늘 운세를 점쳐봤다면 늑대를 주의하라는 점괘가 나오지 않았을까?

1000609766.english: Alice, who was approaching with the sound of her high heels clicking, glanced at the tattered captain's cabin door.
1000609766.korean: - 또각또각 하이힐 소리를 울리며 다가오던 앨리스가 넝마가 된 함장실 문을 힐끗 돌아보았다.

1000609767.english: It's become a bit more open... well, this is in its own way...
1000609767.korean: 조금 개방적인 환경이 됐네요... 뭐, 이건 또 이것 나름대로...

1000609768.english: The situation hasn't improved one bit. Having tasted failure once, the wolves are even more greedy for my body.
1000609768.korean: - 상황은 조금도 나아지지 않았다. 한 번 실패를 맛본 늑대들은 더욱 탐욕스럽게 내 몸을 원해온다.

1000609769.english: - No, after they disappeared together, the situation got worse, as if they had hit it off.
1000609769.korean: - 아니, 함께 사라진 후 의기투합이라도 했는지 상황은 더욱 악화되어 있었다.

1000609770.english: Ahh, Your Majesty~ This time I won't let you go~

1000609771.english: Okay, Wanggashim. Hold on to your master like that.
1000609771.korean: 좋아요, 왕가슴. 그렇게 주인님을 붙잡고 있으세요.

1000609772.english: Ah, Master... You are the only one who can handle me...
1000609772.korean: 아아, 주인님... 저를 감당하실 수 있는 유일하신 분...

1000609773.english: Where were you trying to touch earlier? Here? Or... here?
1000609773.korean: 아까 만지려고 하신 곳이 어디셨죠? 여기? 아니면... 여기?

1000609774.english: Alice's face grows hotter and hotter. Hot, sweet breath tickles her cheek.
1000609774.korean: - 앨리스의 얼굴이 점점 달아오른다. 뜨겁고 달콤한 숨결이 볼을 간질인다.

1000609775.english: Hohoho... It's nice to see the master looking embarrassed.
1000609775.korean: 우후후... 주인님이 난처해하시는 모습을 보는 것도 좋군요.

1000609776.english: Should I decide for you? Right here.
1000609776.korean: 제가 정해드릴까요? 바로 여. 기. 에요.

1000609777.english: - Charlotte, who was rubbing her body against mine, and Alice, who was whispering in my ear and leading my hand.
1000609777.korean: - 마구 몸을 붙여대는 샬럿과 귓가에 속삭이며 내 손을 이끄는 앨리스.

1000609779.english: - I tried to ignore external stimuli and held on to the invitation in my hand so as not to let go.
1000609779.korean: - 외부의 자극을 애써 무시하며 손에 쥔 초대장을 놓치지 않도록 붙들었다.

1000609780.english: - The invitation Fenrir gave you. You said you received it from a witch.
1000609780.korean: - 펜리르가 전해준 초대장. 마녀에게서 받았다고 했었지.

1000609781.english: - It's a witch's invitation. It's so meaningful.

1000609782.english: - It's so meaningful that it actually makes me feel calm. At this level, I can fully enjoy this soft texture.
1000609782.korean: - 너무 의미심장해서 오히려 차분해질 정도. 이정도면 충분히 이 부드러운 감촉을 즐길 수 있겠어.

1000609783.english: "No, that's not it!" Charlotte sensed my sanity faltering for a moment, and her eyes welled up with tears.
1000609783.korean: - 아니 그게 아니잖아! 잠시 내 이성이 허물어진 것을 촉감으로 눈치챈 샬럿이 눈물을 글썽였다.

1000609784.english: Ha, uh, phew...! You finally opened your heart to me! Just, just do it one more time...
1000609784.korean: 하응, 폐, 페하...! 드디어 제게 마음을 열어주셨군요! 다, 다시 한번만 그렇게...

1000609785.english: - Just before the relentless barrage of bullets finally declared defeat, a savior descended on the bridge.
1000609785.korean: - 멈추지 않는 육탄공세에 결국 패배를 선언하기 직전, 함교에 구원자가 강림했다.

1000609787.korean: 이런 불경한 짓이라니! 용납할 수 없습니다!

1000609788.english: Get away from human males now!

1000609789.english: - At Azazel's firm voice, Charlotte and even Alice pulled away with a look of displeasure.
1000609789.korean: - 아자젤의 단호한 목소리에 샬럿은 물론 그 앨리스 조차도 못마땅한 기색으로 몸을 뗐다.

1000609790.english: I came here because I felt an ominous energy while meditating, and I saw this shameless act!
1000609790.korean: 명상중에 불온한기운이 느껴져서 와봤더니 이런 파렴치한 짓을!

1000609791.english: - Alice, who had momentarily backed down from Azazel's momentum, clung to him even more blatantly.
1000609791.korean: - 아자젤의 기세에 잠시 물러섰던 앨리스가 보란듯이 더욱 노골적으로 달라붙었다.

1000609792.english: Welcome, exhibitionist angel. Would you like to join us?

1000609794.english: - Charlotte's white fingers grope my body.
1000609794.korean: - 샬럿의 하얀 손가락이 내 몸을 더듬는다.

1000609795.english: - Azazel, whose eyes were wide open at the hand movements, ran towards us who were entangled.
1000609795.korean: - 그 손놀림에 눈이 휘둥그레졌던 아자젤이 뒤엉켜있는 우리에게 달려들었다.

1000609796.english: Ugh, get out of here, Jise, yo!

1000609797.english: - A huge chest that approaches from the front, unlike the wolves on either side.
1000609797.korean: - 양 옆의 늑대들과는 달리 정면에서 접근하는 거대한 흉부.

1000609798.english: - This resulted in a significant difference in contact area.
1000609798.korean: - 덕분에 접촉 면적에서 중대한 차이가 발생했다.

1000609799.english: - Azazel's whole body presses down on me as he struggles to separate Alice and Charlotte.
1000609799.korean: - 앨리스와 샬럿을 떼어내기 위해 안간힘을 쓰는 아자젤의 온몸이 나를 내리누른다.

1000609800.english: Oh my, you perverted angel. Aren't you doing the same thing we're doing right now?
1000609800.korean: 어머, 변태천사님. 지금 우리랑 같은 짓을 하고 있는 것 아닌가요?

1000609803.english: - It's clear to these three that I'm completely out of their sight. The dizzying scent filling my head makes me feel dazed.
1000609803.korean: - 세 사람에게 나는 안중에도 없는 것이 분명하다. 머릿속까지 차오르는 아찔한 향기에 정신이 멍해지기 시작한다.

1000609804.english: The upper body had long since surrendered. Just as the lower body was about to surrender, Azazel barely managed to pull Charlotte away.
1000609804.korean: - 상반신은 이미 굴복한지 오래였다. 하체마저 항복하기 직전, 아자젤이 간신히 샬럿을 떼어내는데 성공했다.

1000609805.english: - ...Thanks to that, I also fell to the floor.

1000609806.english: What the hell are you doing! My Majesty!

1000609807.english: ...This can't just go away. It's going to require punishment.
1000609807.korean: ...이건 그냥 넘어갈 수 없겠군요. 벌이 필요하겠어요.

1000609808.english: - The two people, indignant at the insubordination, showed their hostility towards Azazel.
1000609808.korean: - 하극상에 분개한 두 사람은 아자젤에게 적의를 드러냈다.

1000609810.english: I would be willing to use any amount of force if it meant leading human men to the right path.
1000609810.korean: 인간 남성을 올바른 길로 이끌수만 있다면 다소의 실력행사라도 불사하겠습니다.

1000609811.english: I'm sure human men will understand too.

1000609812.english: A show of force... that's a word I really like.

1000609813.english: Alice's eyes flashed coldly. Before I could stop her, Alice pulled away and turned her back.
1000609813.korean: - 앨리스의 눈빛이 차갑게 빛났다. 내가 제지하기도 전에 몸을 뗀 앨리스가 등을 돌렸다.

1000609814.english: Rather than having fun and then getting in the way, it's better to eliminate the intruders in advance.
1000609814.korean: 한참 즐거운 중에 초를 치느니, 방해꾼은 미리 배제하는 게 좋겠죠.

1000609815.english: Follow me, Wang Gaseum, you too.

1000609817.english: Anything, as long as it's the master's command...

1000609818.english: Yes, Master. Of course I remember.

1000609820.english: - The three people are listening to me quietly.
1000609820.korean: - 세 사람은 조용히 내 말을 듣고 있다.

1000609822.english: According to the will of the human male.

1000609823.english: I'll get rid of it as quickly as possible and come back. Your Majesty!
1000609823.korean: 최대한 빨리 해치워 버리고 돌아올게요. 나만의 폐하~!

1000609824.english: - Only after the three of them left the captain's cabin could I finally catch my breath.
1000609824.korean: - 세 사람이 함장실을 떠나고 나서야 나는 가까스로 한숨 돌릴 수 있었다.

1000609825.english: - I'm sure you understand. It's not a perfect solution, but...
1000609825.korean: - 충분히 알아들었겠지. 완벽한 해결책이라고는 할 수 없지만...

1000609827.english: - The invitation in my hand was slightly crumpled in the chaos.
1000609827.korean: - 손 안의 초대장이 난리통에 조금 구겨져 있었다.

1000609828.english: - I looked at the invitation in the quiet captain's room.

1000609829.english: - A black envelope with a large pumpkin mark on it that looks like it might explode at any moment.
1000609829.korean: - 당장이라도 폭발할 것처럼 보이는 호박 마크가 큼직하게 찍혀있는 검은 봉투.

1000609830.english: - You're invited to a Halloween party... I flipped over the luxurious gold-framed letterhead, but that was it.
1000609830.korean: - 할로윈 파티에 초대합니다... 고급스러운 금박 테두리가 박힌 편지지를 뒤집어 보았지만 그것뿐이었다.

1000609831.english: Halloween, and a theme park. If this is what Vanilla said...
1000609831.korean: - 할로윈, 그리고 테마 파크. 이곳이 바닐라가 말한 그런 곳이라면...

1000609832.english: - As I bit my lip and put the letter back into the envelope, a red ball of fur suddenly popped out from under my vision.
1000609832.korean: - 입술을 깨물며 편지지를 다시 봉투에 넣을때, 시야 아래에서 붉은 털뭉치가 불쑥 튀어나왔다.

1000609835.english: It was so much fun, everything smelled so good.
1000609835.korean: 여긴 전부 좋은 냄새로 가득해서, 엄~청 재미있었어.

1000609836.english: I ate a lot of delicious food, and... Ah!
1000609836.korean: 맛있는 것도 많이 먹었구, 또... 아!

1000609837.english: Human, or rather, Master, sir? Yes. The Master's scent was everywhere.
1000609837.korean: 인간, 아니 주인, 님? 응. 주인님 냄새도 이곳저곳에 있었어.

1000609838.english: Judging by the number of houses, the owner must be a high-ranking person?
1000609838.korean: 집이 여러개인 걸 보니 주인님은 높은 사람 맞구나?

1000609839.english: Yes, yes! Come on, stroke me!

1000609840.english: Fenrir collapsed to the floor, resting his chin on my knee. His golden eyes, filled with anticipation, stared up at me.
1000609840.korean: - 펜리르가 바닥에 털썩 주저앉은 채로 내 무릎에 턱을 얹었다. 기대감에 찬 황금빛 눈동자가 물끄러미 올려다본다.

1000609841.english: - I carefully placed my hand on her fiery red hair, and contrary to its disheveled appearance, it flowed gently under my touch.
1000609841.korean: - 타는듯한 붉은 머리카락에 조심스레 손을 묻자, 부스스해보이는 겉모습과는 달리 손길에 따라 부드럽게 흘러내렸다.

1000609843.english: - Fenrir, who had been enjoying my touch for a while with his eyes closed, rose and climbed onto my lap.
1000609843.korean: - 지그시 눈을 감고 한동안 손길을 만끽하던 펜리르가 몸을 일으켜 내 무릎위로 올라왔다.

1000609844.english: - I hurriedly pulled myself deeper into the chair, and Fenrir skillfully curled up between my legs.
1000609844.korean: - 황급히 의자 깊숙히 몸을 당기자 펜리르는 재주도 좋게 내 다리 사이에서 몸을 둥글게 웅크렸다.

1000609845.english: - And then this guy yawns and closes his eyes as if he's getting ready.
1000609845.korean: - 그리고는 이녀석, 잘 채비라도 하는 것인지 하품을 하며 눈을 감는다.

1000609847.english: Don't you know? I just told you what the witch told me to tell you.
1000609847.korean: 몰라? 난 그냥 마녀님이 전해주래서 전해준 것 뿐이야.

1000609848.english: - Fenrir squirmed and settled into a comfortable position, then yawned again.
1000609848.korean: - 펜리르는 꼬물거리며 편안하게 자세를 잡곤 또다시 늘어져라 하품을 했다.

1000609849.english: - I really need to figure something out before I fall asleep...
1000609849.korean: - 진짜 잠들어 버리기 전에 뭐라도 알아내야 하는데...

1000609850.english: It should take about an hour.

1000609852.english: - I was speechless at the sight of Fenrir pointing to the wall of the captain's cabin.
1000609852.korean: - 척 하고 함장실의 벽을 가리키는 펜리르의 모습에 할말을 잃고 말았다.

1000609854.english: - I felt stupid asking any more questions, so I leaned back against the backrest.
1000609854.korean: - 더이상 물어보는 것도 바보같아져서 등받이에 등을 기댔다.

1000609856.english: - As I gently swept away his red hair, Fenrir made a pleasant sound even in his sleep.
1000609856.korean: - 펼쳐진 붉은 머리카락을 슬슬 쓸어내리자 펜리르가 자면서도 기분 좋은 소리를 냈다.

1000609857.english: - Now that we're at it, let's ask Fenrir to show us the way when he wakes up. It would be best to go and check on that witch myself.
1000609857.korean: - 이렇게 된 김에 펜리르가 일어나면 길안내를 부탁하자. 그 마녀라는 녀석은 직접 가서 확인하는게 좋겠어.

1000609859.english: This body has received revelation through the power of the True King!
1000609859.korean: 이 몸이 진조의 권능을 통해 계시를 받았노라!

1000609861.english: Beyond that, there is a paradise called 'Theme Park' where sweets and juice flow!
1000609861.korean: 저 너머, 과자와 쥬스가 흐르는 '테마 파크' 라는 낙원이 있도다!

1000609864.english: Of course, it's full of chocolate! Heh heh... Are you ready to be with this body?
1000609864.korean: 물론 초콜릿도 가득하지! 큭큭... 이 몸과 함께할 준비는 되었나?

1000609866.english: Hoo hoo hoo! Good. Then follow this body... Hey!
1000609866.korean: 후 후 후! 좋다. 그렇다면 이 몸을 따라... 야!

1000609867.english: Where are you going with all that stuff! Hurry up and empty your pockets!
1000609867.korean: 그렇게 수북히 채워놓고 어딜 간다는 거야! 얼른 주머니 비우고 와!

1000609871.english: Okay, I'll give you this. The candy the Commander gave you, the cookies Charlotte gave you, and the chocolate bars...
1000609871.korean: 자, 이거 줄게. 사령관님이 주신 캔디랑 샬럿 언니가 나눠준 쿠키랑 초코바랑...

1000609873.english: Dutch Girl! Do you want to eat together?

1000609874.english: K, Cookie...? Jim, I've never received anything like that...
1000609874.korean: 쿠, 쿠키...? 짐은 그런건 받은 적 없는데...

1000609875.english: My sister Charlotte was eating in the corner and then shared it with me!
1000609875.korean: 샬럿 언니가 구석에서 먹고 있다가 나눠줬어!

1000609876.english: He was just smiling brightly... why?

1000609879.english: Eight, there's nothing I can do about it. I'll set off on a grand expedition right now!
1000609879.korean: 에잇, 이렇게 된 이상 어쩔 수 없지. 지금 당장 위대한 원정을 떠나겠노라!

1000609880.english: Oh, wild guide who will assist this body! Reveal your form!
1000609880.korean: 이, 이몸을 보필할 야성의 인도자여! 그 모, 모습을 드러내거라!

1000609881.english: Huh? LRL, why are you shaking? Are you cold? Should I give you a scarf?
1000609881.korean: 응? LRL 왜 떨어? 추워? 목도리 줄까?

1000609885.english: Let's go. We'll be there in an hour.

1000609886.english: Ma, your tone is different from before...

1000609889.english: Uh, there's nothing to eat right now! So hurry up... Ah.
1000609889.korean: 지, 지금 먹을 건 아무것도 없어! 그러니까 빨리... 앗.

1000609890.english: Now that I think about it, I got scolded by the commander earlier for wandering around without permission...
1000609890.korean: 그러고보니 아까 멋대로 돌아다녔다고 사령관한테 혼났는데...

1000609891.english: That's okay. The master said I could do whatever I wanted as long as I was with him.
1000609891.korean: 그건 괜찮아. 주인님이 나랑 같이 있으면 하고 싶은대로 해도 된다고 했어.

1000609893.english: Alvis, Hachiko, come here. And Dutch Girl too.
1000609893.korean: 자, 알비스, 하치코, 이리 와. 더치걸도.

1000609894.english: Ahem. In the name of the noble Jinjo! I declare the start of the expedition!
1000609894.korean: 엣헴. 고귀한 진조의 이름으로! 원정의 개시를 선언하노라!

1000609896.english: An hour, you say... West, the temple... Middle, ground...
1000609896.korean: 한 시간, 이라면서... 서, 성전을... 중, 지...

1000609901.english: It took me an hour? I'm here. It's right there.
1000609901.korean: 나는 한 시간 걸렸는데? 다 왔어. 바로 저기야.

1000609902.english: But you're skinny, but you're stronger than you look?
1000609902.korean: 그런데 너는 삐쩍 말랐으면서 보기보다 튼튼하구나?

1000609903.english: Because I'm used to moving my body...

1000609904.english: Hmm... can I bite into it?

1000609906.english: If I get bitten by you, I think I'll have to lie down for quite a while...
1000609906.korean: 네게 물리면 꽤 오래 누워 있어야 할 것 같아서...

1000609908.english: Lost little sheep, do not go forward.
1000609908.korean: 길 잃은 어린 양들이여, 이 앞으로 가서는 안됩니다.

1000609910.english: We are! This very body, led by the great vampire king, Jinjo!
1000609910.korean: 우리는! 바로 이 몸, 위대한 흡혈귀 왕 진조가 이끄는!

1000609911.english: We are the 'Candy Hunters' who have set out on a sacred expedition!

1000609913.english: Why aren't you listening to me?

1000609914.english: Do not fall for the deceptions of the pagans. Stop and surrender to the glory of the merciful light.
1000609914.korean: 이교도의 꾐에 넘어가서는 안됩니다. 발걸음을 멈추고, 자비로운 빛의 영광에 몸을 맡기세요.

1000609915.english: As expected... it was that kind of place...

1000609916.english: I think I know what kind of place it was... now.
1000609916.korean: 어떤 곳이었는지... 이제 알 것 같기도 해.

1000609919.english: Oh my, I was wondering where you disappeared to while you were dealing with the Metal Parasites, but you were hanging out with the kids?
1000609919.korean: 어머, 철충들을 처리하는 중에 어디로 사라졌나 했더니, 꼬마들과 어울리고 있었나요?

1000609920.english: Come here, kids. You'll get perverted if you stay next to that exhibitionist angel.
1000609920.korean: 아가들, 이리로 와요. 저런 노출증 천사 옆에 있다간 변태가 옮아요.

1000609921.english: My garments are for receiving the glory of light with my whole body and for embracing the chosen one.
1000609921.korean: 제 의복은 빛의 영광을 온몸으로 받아들이고, 선택된 분을 품에 안기 위한 것.

1000609922.english: Unlike those shameless and obscene people like you.

1000609924.english: Let's see which side the kids are taking.

1000609926.english: Alvis is a count... and he's starving... it's strange...

1000609928.english: ... Meat pie... I want to eat it...

1000609929.english: Okay, I brought some snacks for you~ Shall we share them?
1000609929.korean: 자자, 언니가 간식거리를 챙겨뒀어요~ 사이좋게 나눠 먹어요?

1000609931.english: Ji, Jim is fine. Guo, for the sake of the retinue...
1000609931.korean: 지, 짐은 괜찮노라. 궈, 권속들을 위해...

1000609935.english: I've already dealt with the Metal Parasites over there, so shall we take a break there?
1000609935.korean: 저쪽에 철충들을 처리해놨으니까 거기서 잠깐 쉴까요?

1000609938.english: I guess I'll have to resort to the Cardinal's power.

1000609940.english: - A pair of longing eyes, one side of which is hidden by hair, look at me.
1000609940.korean: - 한 쪽이 머리카락에 가려진, 애타는 눈동자가 나를 바라본다.

1000609941.english: - Just that alone makes me feel like Azazel is truly speaking for my sake.
1000609941.korean: - 단지 그것만으로도 아자젤이 진심으로 나를 위해 하는 말이라는 것이 느껴진다.

1000609942.korean: 인간 남성, 부디 다시 생각해 주시길...

1000609943.english: - Azazel's hand, which approached and carefully grabbed my arm, was trembling slightly.
1000609943.korean: - 다가서서 조심스레 내 팔을 붙잡은 아자젤의 손이 가늘게 떨린다.

1000609946.english: But please give me a little more time before I leave.
1000609946.korean: 그래도 출발하기 전에 조금만 더 시간을 내 주세요.

1000609947.english: - As the bridge door opened, Azazel took a step back.
1000609947.korean: - 함교의 출입문이 열리자 아자젤이 한 걸음 뒤로 물러섰다.

1000609948.english: - The girl in red came in, grabbed her skirt, and bent her knees slightly.
1000609948.korean: - 붉은 옷의 소녀가 들어와 치마를 잡으며 살짝 무릎을 굽혔다.

1000609951.english: I should have come to see you sooner, but I was delayed because I had to input data to assist Your Majesty after being regenerated. I apologize.
1000609951.korean: 진작 찾아 뵈었어야 했지만, 재생산된 후 폐하를 보좌하기 위한 데이터를 입력하느라 늦어지고 말았습니다. 죄송합니다.

1000609953.english: We cannot allow Your Majesty to step into such a hotbed of corruption.
1000609953.korean: 폐하께서 그런 타락의 온상으로 발을 들이게 할 수는 없습니다.

1000609954.english: Your Majesty, please follow Azazel and me. I beg you.
1000609954.korean: 폐하, 아자젤과 제 말을 따라주세요. 간청드립니다.

1000609955.english: - In your firm and stubborn attitude, you can see the sincerity that you felt a little while ago.
1000609955.korean: - 단호하고 고집스러운 태도에서 조금 전에도 느꼈던 진심이 엿보인다.

1000609958.english: - I tried to ignore the desperate voice and operated the command console.
1000609958.korean: - 애타는 목소리를 애써 무시하고 지휘 콘솔을 조작했다.

1000609960.english: I was playing with my sister Charlotte! We ate snacks, and...
1000609960.korean: 샬럿 언니랑 놀고 있었어! 과자도 먹고, 또...

1000609961.english: - I also feel good seeing Alvis chattering excitedly.
1000609961.korean: - 신나게 재잘거리는 알비스의 모습에 나도 기분이 좋아진다.

1000609964.english: - Alvis disappeared and I also got up from my chair.
1000609964.korean: - 알비스의 모습이 사라지고 나도 의자에서 일어났다.

1000609965.english: - And the two people still standing there.
1000609965.korean: - 그리고 여전히 자리를 지키고 서있는 두 사람.

1000609967.english: - The two were still talking quietly until I left the bridge.
1000609967.korean: - 내가 함교를 나설 때 까지도 두 사람은 조용히 이야기를 나누고 있었다.

1000609968.english: As I saw earlier, it's not just the breasts that are big, it's the breasts that are big. They're quite big.
1000609968.korean: 아까도 봤지만 가슴만 큰 건 아니네요, 왕가슴. 제법이에요.

1000609969.english: Haha, I can do anything for Your Majesty.
1000609969.korean: 후후, 폐하를 위해서라면 무엇이든 할 수 있죠.

1000609971.english: That's right. You are the only one who can handle me.
1000609971.korean: 맞아요. 주인님이야말로 저를 다룰 수 있는 유일한 분이에요.

1000609973.english: The master is a man of great character, so I can forgive him for occasionally turning a blind eye, but...
1000609973.korean: 주인님께선 그릇이 크신 분이니, 가끔씩 눈을 돌리시는 것 까지는 용서해 드릴 수 있지만...

1000609974.english: Those who try to interrupt your good time are a different story.
1000609974.korean: 즐거운 시간을 방해하려는 것들은 이야기가 다르죠.

1000609975.english: How about it, Wang Gaseum? Let's cooperate for the time being.

1000609976.english: It's about driving out the troublemakers and taking over the master.

1000609977.english: If it's about seducing my brother, I can't miss out!
1000609977.korean: 오빠를 유혹하는 거라면 나도 빠질 수 없지!

1000609978.english: Doctor? I understand your feelings, but I doubt His Majesty will allow it...
1000609978.korean: 닥터? 마음은 알겠지만 폐하께서 허락하지 않으실텐데요...

1000609979.english: Yeah. This isn't a place for a kid. Go join the other kids.
1000609979.korean: 그래요. 꼬맹이가 낄 자리가 아니에요. 저기 다른 꼬맹이들에게 가세요.

1000609980.english: Hohoho... So I prepared it! The new drug that was in development was!
1000609980.korean: 후후후... 그래서 준비했지! 개발에 들어갔던 신약이 무려!

1000609981.english: You said it's almost finished! I don't know when it will be finished!
1000609981.korean: 거의 완성 단계에 접어들었단 말씀! 언제 완성될지는 모르겠지만!

1000609982.english: Hehehe, when I get a nice, plump body, I can finally go with my brother... Hehehe...
1000609982.korean: 흐흐, 쭉쭉빵빵한 몸이 되면 드디어 오빠랑... 흐흐흐...

1000609984.english: Maybe the Doctor and I can become closer?
1000609984.korean: 어쩌면 닥터와 우린 더 친해질 수 있을지도?

1000609986.english: You are trying to lead the lamb astray.
1000609986.korean: 어린 양을 잘못된 길로 인도하려 하시는군요.

1000609987.english: I will no longer tolerate any attempts to corrupt Your Majesty.
1000609987.korean: 폐하를 타락시키려는 행위를 더는 묵과하지 않겠습니다.

1000609989.english: They are really annoying troublemakers who don't even bother to hit you.

1000609990.english: It was the master's order to clear the way to the theme park.
1000609990.korean: 테마 파크로 가는 길을 정리하라는 건 주인님의 명령이셨어요.

1000609991.english: Surely, you're not refusing my master's orders... are you?
1000609991.korean: 설마, 주인님의 명령을 거부하시는 건... 아니겠죠?

1000609992.english: If that's the case... it doesn't just end there.

1000609993.english: We are only trying to prevent Your Majesty from going down the wrong path.
1000609993.korean: 저희는 폐하가 그릇된 길로 들어서는 것을 막으려는 것 뿐입니다.

1000609994.english: I will send you back first, and then I will try to persuade His Majesty again.
1000609994.korean: 당신들을 먼저 돌려보내고, 폐하를 다시 설득하겠어요.

1000609995.english: I know your affection for His Majesty, but I don't think that's the right way to go about it.
1000609995.korean: 당신들의 폐하를 향한 애정은 잘 알고 있어요. 하지만 그런 방식은 바람직하지 않습니다.

1000609997.english: Charlotte Musketeers, stop your rage and think rationally...
1000609997.korean: 샬럿 총사대장. 폭주를 멈추고 이성적으로 생각...

1000609998.english: I love Your Majesty more than anything in this world.
1000609998.korean: 저는 폐하를 이 세상 그 무엇보다도 사랑한답니다.

1000609999.english: So, Your Majesty and that sticky... Oh, the kids will hear that.
1000609999.korean: 그래서 폐하와 그런 끈적한... 어머, 아가들이 듣겠군요.

1000610000.english: Huh? Your Majesty is the master, right? Why the master?
1000610000.korean: 응? 폐하라는 건 주인님이지? 주인님이 왜?

1000610001.english: Hehe. I want to do all sorts of things because I love Your Majesty. Is that a problem?
1000610001.korean: 후훗. 폐하를 사랑하기 때문에 이런저런 것들을 하고 싶은거에요. 문제 있나요?

1000610003.english: How is it? Do you like His Majesty too?

1000610004.english: Yeah yeah! Master, it smells good!

1000610005.english: That's right! Your Majesty's scent is truly... haaang...

1000610006.english: Dear Miss, would you please guide me to the theme park as His Majesty requested?
1000610006.korean: 귀여운 아가씨, 폐하께서 부탁하신 대로 테마파크까지 안내해 주겠어요?

1000610008.english: Just follow me, the road is right over there!

1000610009.english: ...As it has not been reproduced for long, there is still a lack of data.
1000610009.korean: ...역시 재생산된 지 얼마 되지 않아서 아직 데이터가 부족하군요.

1000610010.english: Still, it is within the scope of what can be managed.
1000610010.korean: 그래도 수습할 수 있는 범위 내입니다.

1000610011.english: Azazel, how is the thing I asked you to do going?
